name: Fig Honey Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash figs and cover with cold water. Simmer for 10 minutes, then drain.
2. Cut the figs into pieces.
3. Cream together sugar and shortening until smooth.
4. Add honey, eggs, and milk to the mixture. Mix thoroughly.
5. Sift flour, baking powder, salt, orange rind, and lemon extract.
6. Gradually add the sifted ingredients to the creaming mixture.
7. Incorporate the figs, coconut, and flavorings into the batter.
8. Drop spoonfuls of the dough onto a well-oiled baking sheet.
9. Bake in a hot oven (435°F) for 12-15 minutes.
36 servings.
